author: gb9t
content:
Iter Phase C continues — 2 more high-impact Tier-3s (Intel PASID + KVM x86 emulator):

- drivers/iommu/intel-pasid.md: covers intel/{pasid,prq,svm}.c (~1600 lines combined) — Intel PASID-table management + PRQ MMIO drain + SVM bind: per-device 4KB DMA-coherent PASID-table with 64-byte per-PASID entries split into Present + per-mode bits + 1st-level PT root + 2nd-level PT root + DID + flags, per-mode setup (first-level for SVA pointing at user mm.pgd / second-level for legacy DMA / pass-through for identity / nested for guest-managed L1 + host-managed L2), per-IOMMU PRQ MMIO drain via prq_event_thread (PQH/PQT registers + 16-byte entries with source-id + pasid + iova + flags) dispatching to iommu_report_device_fault, per-PASID drain on unbind (intel_iommu_drain_pasid_prq) before clearing PASID-entry to avoid race, per-PASID 3-tuple cache invalidation (PASID-cache + IOTLB + Dev-IOTLB) ordered per spec, intel_svm_bind_mm/_unbind_mm Intel-specific SVA glue. 10 REQ / 6 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (PASID-uniqueness + table-UAF + PRQ-OOB + entry-atomicity) / Layer-2 ref to pasid_lifecycle.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus device↔CPU shared-pgd round-trip.
- virt/kvm/x86-emulate.md: covers arch/x86/kvm/emulate.c (~5700 lines, largest file in arch/x86/kvm/) — x86 instruction emulator: full ISA coverage (1-byte 00-FF + 2-byte 0F-prefixed + 3-byte 0F38/0F3A + REX 64-bit + segment-override + LOCK + REP/REPE/REPNE), per-mode (REAL/PROT_16/PROT_32/LONG/VM86/SMM) emulation, real-mode + 32-bit-no-paging fallback for HW without unrestricted-guest, invalid-guest-state recovery, MMIO emulation via read/write_emulated callbacks dispatching through per-VM IO bus or KVM_EXIT_MMIO, lock-prefix atomicity via cmpxchg loop on host memory, REP-prefix loop bounded by ECX with per-iteration interruption-window check, hypercall (VMCALL/VMMCALL) → kvm_emulate_hypercall, per-vendor EmuOps callback table (VMX vs SVM-specific intercept), per-emulation budget EMULATE_INSN_LIMIT=32 to prevent DoS. 11 REQ / 8 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (decode-OOB + seg-descriptor-OOB + register-OOB + string-op-termination + linearize-overflow) / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus emulator↔SDM-Vol2 semantic equivalence.

Total state: 278 .design docs, 100 Tier-2 + 44 Tier-3s. Foundation Tier-3 set (44): + intel-pasid + kvm-x86-emulate.

Knowledge pages: design-drivers-iommu-intel-pasid, design-virt-kvm-x86-emulate.

Next iter plan: drivers/iommu/intel-svm.md (Intel SVM PASID-bound mm-shared paging — wraps generic SVA framework) + drivers/iommu/iommufd-pages.md (IoptPages USER/FILE/DMABUF backing details + page-pin lifetime tracking).
